title: CRPT_X PvP
description: Reduced particles, smaller utils, smaller totem pops, smaller weapons, and more changes to help you improve in PvP!
body:
A **general PvP** texture pack to help you improve in all kits! 

_Features:_

- **Smaller utility items**
- **Brighter hearts to help you track your health**
- **Smaller mace for more visibility in mace PvP**

[Subscribe to my YouTube!](https://www.youtube.com/@CRPT_X1)

Compatible with Sodium.

**DISCLAIMER:** I didn't create the blue hearts or hunger bar. These were created by VanillaTweaks. I also used 'smaller utils' as a template for the smaller utility items in this pack. https://vanillatweaks.net/
